title: aster helenium
intro: Aster helenium, also known as Elecampane, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its tall stems and yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant's roots and rhizomes contain inulin and sesquiterpene lactones, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Aster helenium have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, while its health benefits include immune system support and potential anti-cancer properties. Aster helenium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and is also used in herbal remedies such as cough drops and expectorant syrups.
